name: RFdiffusion3
description: Design a de novo binder to a target with complex all atom constraints. Experimentally characterized DNA binding proteins and cysteine hydrolases.
capabilities: Design a de novo binder to a target with complex all atom constraints
Experimentally characterized DNA binding proteins and cysteine hydrolases

pdbFile.description: Input PDB file with target molecule and/or atomic motif coordinates

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target molecule

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed protein

hotspots.description: Residues or atoms to focus design on

hbondConstraints.description: Hydrogen bonding constraints specifying donor and acceptor atoms

solventAccessibility.description: RASA constraints controlling burial depth of ligand atoms

symmetry.description: Symmetry constraints for oligomeric design (e.g., C3, D2, C5)
